TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-home_buya_imuy

S.FORM: maken tangi haw tanan pa imi anu temawaR si.
yau a lanasniq qangid tanan sa kalinku anu temawaR zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天有事情，想要回去花蓮。
We have things (to do) tomorrow and want to go back to Hualian.

S.FORM: mai qawtu anu temawaR anu iza u anu qawtuan pasazi tazian.
S.TRANSL: 下次可能沒時間來這裡。
I probably won’t have time to come here next time.

S.FORM: pasi mai pama qawtu.
S.TRANSL: Maybe (I) won’t be able to come.

S.FORM: si qumni wanay yau ti ‘nay nani tongzhi na na singsi si awka imi mawtu uman zinku.
S.TRANSL: 不知道什麼時候老師通知我再回來。
I will come here sometime when the teacher notifies me.

S.FORM: nani anu yau ti ‘nay tongzhi na singsi si awka imi mawtu uman pasazi tazian ta taidaan zinku ni sikawma.
S.TRANSL: We will come again to NTU if notified.

S.FORM: m azu manan ita si.
yau pama sa sinsanuan tu zana la na zinna ay atu zana lepaw ay zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們還要談家裡的事情。
We still need to talk about some family matters.

S.FORM: uta aisu i aisu supaR ay si.
naquni nikasianemsu zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我想知道你的想法是什麼。
I want to know your opinion.

S.FORM: anu nianu zinnumi saswani ay si.
S.TRANSL: 你們做弟妹的如果決定什麼事，
If you younger generation decides on anything,

S.FORM: nianatiziku aiku saqaqa ay zinku ya.
S.TRANSL: 我做大姐的沒有什麼意見。
As a sister, I don’t have any opinion.

S.FORM: hm qawman kilimanta ‘nay qenaswanita qalisimpu qawka miza tu hm lanasta.
S.TRANSL: 我們當然要找我們的兄弟姊妹聚在一起，處理一些事情。
We certainly will gather our siblings and take care of some matters.

S.FORM: nayawu nayawu sayzi.
'nay zena tazian nani pameng ma maiza.
S.TRANSL: The paddy has become like this.

S.FORM: ma pun lanasna tu zana nialaanna lazan ‘nay zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 關於那塊地呢，地被道路徵收的事情還沒解決。
About the land, that the land was levied is not settled yet.

S.FORM: tayan tasinsyaan nanay.
hm m m pataz miza ti abu tayan tu mana mai pama.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽常常在問這件事為什麼還沒解決。
Mother often asks why the thing hasn’t been solved yet.

S.FORM: mzukat saizaanna sab sabulaanna timaitaan tu kelisiw kelisiw ‘nay zana iza ay.
S.TRANSL: Why isn’t the money given to us yet?

S.FORM: m zinna ni abu nani.
patazanku miza qaya palingwa nani.
yau sayzi niizaanna ni nipatuqesanna .
ni sika ni palingwaanna na m iza.
na zana nianu ay ti ‘nay.
lazan ‘nay nialaanna lazan ‘nay zena ‘nay kwa nani.
S.TRANSL: 地被路徵收的那件事啊。
The thing about the road being levied.

S.FORM: m pama.
anu mawtu ‘nay sudad ‘nay tangi zinna kya.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽說今天公文會下來。
Mother said that the official document would be issued today.

S.FORM: tanian ta hualien nali.
‘nay hualiendaqiao ‘nay kwa.
a tihuangxiansheng ‘nay m m patazika palingwa zinna ni abu.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽叫我要常常打電話過去。
Mother tells me to call them often.

S.FORM: nani mai salibayan qazusaanku palingwa nani.
S.TRANSL: 我一個禮拜打兩次電話。

S.FORM: ipili palana iku palanaika ti lingwaku zinna.
stangi mai pama nani.
amawaR manan ita si.
teqazansu pa ti.
S.TRANSL: You stop by (and take care of that)?

S.FORM: teqazan nengi ti azu yau lawazta tmeqaz nengi ya.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們有時間的話,可以啊。

S.FORM: nengi ti anu teqazan.
wanay ka yau qumni aizipna talepawan zinta ya.
S.TRANSL: 但是他在不在家我們也不知道。
But we don’t know if he will be at home.

S.FORM: qunayka palingwa si kawka zinku ya.
nayau nikasianemanku sayzi nani.
wanay mwaza lanasna aizipna.
pataz sma m smasaqay tu.
zana lazan ‘nay si.
lazan ay na atu iza ya tu pasasani ay.
S.TRANSL: (為了)路的事情和別的事情東跑西跑。
(He) rushes about for things about the road and others.

S.FORM: mai yu wama zata ay qaya lanas ya lanasna si.
S.TRANSL: 他要忙的事情並不是只有我們的事。
He is busy not only with our things.

S.FORM: miso m mawaR manan ita si.
S.TRANSL: We will go back (to Xinshe) tomorrow, then,

S.FORM: yau lanas zau zana ni qa.
S.TRANSL: 有(過世的那個人的)事情(要忙)。
There will be things about (the person who passed away).

S.FORM: m ityu tizunsing ay si.
ni ku tuzani taneman timaizipana Ranaw.
niz ita tanan pasazi ta sinsyaan anu temawaR anu iza u.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天全部要回去新社。
All of us will go back to Xinshe tomorrow.

S.FORM: sanhao u erhao pa iku tmanan zinku nani .
anu tmanan ti ita si.
awka ita simsanu mniz si awka nengi zinku ya.
S.TRANSL: 我們全部再一起談，我想這樣比較好。
We can talk about (it) together. I think it would be better.

S.FORM: ah nengi ti nayau.
en usi aiku si.
qangasan iku qangasan iku zinku manan.
S.TRANSL: I think I will go back later.

S.FORM: suRabi pa iku manan zinku aikuan.
S.TRANSL: I will take the night train back.

S.FORM: eh suRabi pa imu.
S.TRANSL: You will go back at night?

S.FORM: tiazay qaya nani suRabi pa imi zinna qaya smanu nani.
S.TRANSL: 阿才說他們也要趁夜回去。
Azay said, “We will also go back at night.”

S.FORM: ita.
S.TRANSL: I don’t know. (I am not sure.)

S.FORM: naquni kelawkawayan na qaniyau Raynguanku pama qaya nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們的工作怎麼樣我還不清楚。
I don’t know how their work is.

S.FORM: qawanay ti sanhao Rabi si awka iku tanan zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說他只好三號晚上才可以回去。
He said, “I can go back only on the night of 3.”

S.FORM: ita tanan u qumuni Raynguanku qaya.
S.TRANSL: 回去或怎麼樣，我也不知道。
To go back or whatever. I don’t know either.

S.FORM: niqeinu sanhao ti ma jueding zaku ay sanhao tu tananan .
S.TRANSL: 我決定三號一定要回去。

S.FORM: tu Rabi.
tu Rabi taRbabi ti maseq tu lepaw ah zinku.
S.TRANSL: 坐夜車，我想早上就到家了。
Taking the night (train), I think I would arrive home in the morning.

S.FORM: eN ganghao tmanan ti nengi ti ya.
S.TRANSL: 剛好(出殯那天)回來，可以啦。
Coming back just (on the day of the funeral). It’s ok.

S.FORM: m m m ‘nay ni sanuan ni abu tu zana zana ay tu saazasanna ‘nay iza ka dianfongshansu nani.
S.TRANSL: 阿母交代要帶回去的有你的電風扇。
Mother asked (you) to bring back your fan.

S.FORM: eh ‘nay inshuiji ‘nay qaya.
S.TRANSL: As well as the water cooler.

S.FORM: m ti isisannumi pa u how zinaq ni aimu pa misis ay hata haw.
S.TRANSL: 你們來提還是怎麼樣，(飲水機)很重呢，你們來提好了。
You carry (the water cooler) or whatever. It’s heavy. You carry it.

S.FORM: kwa ya azu yau si.
eN azu yau ti si.
pizya talepawan si.
aimu pa ti mazas ay patanan si awka zinku zinaq qaya qamu isisisanku zinku ya.
S.TRANSL: 你們再帶回去才好。很重耶，我怎麼可能提來提去?
Then you bring it back. (It’s) heavy; how can I carry it around?

S.FORM: en nengi ti.
aw en mala dianfongshan ‘nay.
m uzusa inengat ma ‘nay wama ‘nay inshuiji inshuiji ‘nay zinaq.
S.TRANSL: 這兩個只有那個(電風扇)比較輕，飲水機很重。
Between the two, only (the fan) is lighter; the water cooler is heavy.

S.FORM: bijiao zinaq.
S.TRANSL: The water cooler is relatively heavier.

S.FORM: en m alaka pama tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti meifang qaya nani.
S.TRANSL: 我還叫美芳去拿(/買)阿母的牛奶。
I also told Meifang to buy the milk Mother wanted.

S.FORM: palingwaanku nani mana mai tu melaycyap ay tu lingwaku ka zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我打電話(給媽媽)，怎麼沒有人接我的電話。
I called Mother; how come nobody answered my phone?

S.FORM: sanuanku ti abin nani.
pa izaika.
palingwaika ti meifang si mala pa tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti tiabi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我叫阿明打電話給美芳叫她買媽媽的牛奶(奶粉)。
I told Abin to call Meifang and to ask her to buy the milk Mother wanted.

S.FORM: kwa ya zinna ni abin nani.
sanhao aiku tanan qaya zinna ni abin.
S.TRANSL: 阿明說：「我也是三號回去。」
Abin said, “I will also go back on (June) 3.”

S.FORM: smanu.
tanan pa qaya.
tanan qaya zinna.
S.TRANSL: He said (he) would also go back.

S.FORM: azu yau ‘nay kelawkawayanna naRin manan zinku.
S.TRANSL: 如果他有工作的話，我想(阿明)不要回去(比較好)。
If he has work, I think (it would be better for him) not to go back.

S.FORM: pun ti iku qingjia zinna.
S.TRANSL: He said, “I’ve already taken (several days’) leave.”

S.FORM: m si nayau mniz manan ita n nengi ti.
S.TRANSL: 那樣的話，我們全部都回去也好啦。
If so, it would be better that all of us went back.

S.FORM: ni tmanan nengi ti paqsiqaz qaya tu.
S.TRANSL: 回去也好，不然不好意思。
It would be good (for all of us) to go back; otherwise we would feel sorry.

S.FORM: maiyu ti tiana.
m ‘nay tama na swanita qaya ni kincyang si.
m m ah nengi ti.
m m en.
nayawma sikawmaanniq.
